The '''Zuborte Ma''' [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]] was located between the planets of [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]] and [[Itzeho/Legends|Itzeho]], in the [[Mygeeto system/Legends|Mygeeto system]] of the [[Albarrio sector/Legends|Albarrio sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was considered an easy asteroid field to navigate since the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] took control of the system.<ref name="DP">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a part of the [[Battle of Mygeeto (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Mygeeto]] took place in the asteroid field.<ref name="IA">''[[Star Wars: Imperial Ace]]''</ref>
